body:
Jim,

Just confirming Section 4 of the IRB renewal reads clean on my last pass. I'll send the annotated PDF over tomorrow morning after I run it past Amanda. Enrollment update: 340 of 500 as of last Friday, and we should be back on the 6-a-week pace by mid-October.

Jason
subject: Re: IRB renewal — Section 4 edits

body:
Ravi,

Case list for Monday looks manageable. The Foster case is the only complex one — I'd like to review the CT with you before we finalize TAVR vs SAVR. Free at 6:30 AM Tuesday tennis, or grab me between cases Monday?

Jason
subject: Monday cases + Foster review

body:
Kyle,

Proud of you for pushing through the Step 2 practice score dip. That's exactly the pattern I saw in fellowship — the plateau always breaks. Sunday 7 call as usual? I'll be at the piano warming up.

Dad
subject: Step 2 check-in
